---
title: "Tally Rally Teammate Stats"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
library(knitr)
```

Set the player here, then run the notebook.

```{r parameters}
target_player <- "Diana Elsner"
minimum_games <- 3
```

```{r load-data}
games <- read_csv(
  here("data", "TallyRallyGames.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    `Score A` = as.numeric(`Score A`),
    `Score B` = as.numeric(`Score B`)
  )
```

```{r teammate-stats}
team_a_games <- games %>%
  filter(`Team A Player 1` == target_player | `Team A Player 2` == target_player) %>%
  transmute(
    Teammate = if_else(`Team A Player 1` == target_player, `Team A Player 2`, `Team A Player 1`),
    Won = `Score A` > `Score B`
  )

team_b_games <- games %>%
  filter(`Team B Player 1` == target_player | `Team B Player 2` == target_player) %>%
  transmute(
    Teammate = if_else(`Team B Player 1` == target_player, `Team B Player 2`, `Team B Player 1`),
    Won = `Score B` > `Score A`
  )

teammate_games <- bind_rows(team_a_games, team_b_games) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Teammate), Teammate != "")

teammate_summary <- teammate_games %>%
  group_by(Teammate) %>%
  summarize(
    Games = n(),
    Wins = sum(Won, na.rm = TRUE),
    Losses = Games - Wins,
    Win_Pct = round(100 * Wins / Games, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(Games >= minimum_games) %>%
  arrange(desc(Win_Pct), desc(Games), Teammate)

cat("Target player:", target_player, "\n")
cat("Total teammate games:", nrow(teammate_games), "\n")
cat("Unique teammates:", n_distinct(teammate_games$Teammate), "\n\n")

print(n = 20, teammate_summary)
```
